title: poa nemoralis subsp. korshunensis
intro: Poa nemoralis subsp. korshunensis is a subspecies of the poa nemoralis grass, a type of wild grass found in certain regions. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis subsp. korshunensis include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions, as well as being used in the form of infusions or tinctures for its medicinal properties.
